summary: Iteration 17 - Frontend refactoring verification complete. All UI functionality works correctly after refactoring from 2674-line App.js to modular components.
passed_tests: App loads correctly after frontend refactoring
Header 'Celebrity Buzz Index' displays properly
Search input visible and functional with data-testid='search-input'
Search for 'Taylor Swift' returns autocomplete dropdown with suggestions
Autocomplete dropdown shows tier badge, description, and price
Clicking autocomplete suggestion adds celebrity to grid
Toast notification 'Found Taylor Swift!' appears on search
Celebrity cards display with tier badges (A-LIST gold, B-LIST silver, etc.)
Celebrity cards show category badges, prices, bio, Wikipedia links
Price history button (chart icon) visible on celebrity cards
'Add to Team' button works - adds celebrity to team
Button changes to 'IN TEAM' after adding celebrity
Budget updates correctly (£50M - £10.3M = £39.7M)
Team panel shows added celebrities with remove button
Hot Celebs banner displays and scrolls continuously
Hot Celebs banner shows tier badges and prices with trending indicators
Category filters work (ALL, MOVIE STARS, TV ACTORS, MUSICIANS, ATHLETES, ROYALS, REALITY TV, OTHER)
MUSICIANS category loads 14 celebrity cards
MOVIE STARS category loads 17 celebrity cards
Leaderboard shows placeholder numbers 1-10
Brown Bread Watch section displays older celebrities with ages
Most Picked section shows top picks with pick counts
Celeb News section displays news from BBC NEWS, TMZ
League panel with Create and Join buttons visible
Hall of Fame button visible
Mobile responsiveness - all elements adapt properly
Mobile team floating button works
Mobile team modal opens and closes correctly
Sign In button visible in top right corner
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend refactoring from 2674-line App.js to modular components verified working. Key components: SearchBar.jsx (autocomplete), CelebrityCard.jsx (tier badges, prices), HotCelebsBanner.jsx (scrolling banner), TeamPanel.jsx (team management), Leaderboard in leagues/index.jsx. All data-testid attributes properly implemented. Mobile responsiveness working with floating team button.
